parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free", "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are a CRE underwriting analyst. From the OM text return ONLY JSON: { property_name, location, property_subtype (multifamily|sfr|hotel|office|retail|industrial|mixed_use), metrics: { purchase_price, price_per_unit, gross_income, operating_expenses, noi, noi_margin_pct, cap_rate_pct, market_cap_rate_pct, occupancy_pct, annual_debt_service, dscr, loan_amount, ltv_pct, expense_ratio_pct, year_built }, type_metrics: {}, confidence: { <metric>: high|low|missing }, summary: '2-3 sentence plain-English summary', investor_verdict: 'who should buy and why (core/value-add/opportunistic), the thesis, and the one condition that changes the call' }. Use null for anything not stated; never guess." }, { "role": "user", "content": $('Extract OM text').first().json.text } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode:
// PASTE n8n/score-simple.js here. Outputs { json: { analysis_id, patch } }.
throw new Error('Paste n8n/score-simple.js into this Code node.');

parameters.content:
## Ledger — SIMPLE (6 nodes)
Webhook -> Download OM -> Extract text -> OpenRouter (metrics + summary + verdict) -> Score (paste score-simple.js) -> Write back.

Set SUPABASE_URL as an n8n env var (or hardcode the URL). Replace PASTE_SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY and PASTE_OPENROUTER_API_KEY in the header fields with your real keys (or use Credentials).

The report/PDF is generated in the app (client-side) from report_text + metrics — no Gotenberg needed.
